title: Ribes palczewskii
taxonomy: Ribes palczewskii is a species of flowering plant in the family Grossulariaceae. This plant is closely related to currants and gooseberries, which are also part of the same family. It is classified within the genus Ribes, which includes various species of flowering plants commonly known as currants and gooseberries. The plant's classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Saxifragales, Family: Grossulariaceae, Genus: Ribes, Species: R. palczewskii. The specific classification of Ribes palczewskii is based on its unique characteristics and genetic traits.
